### Summary

Please include a short description of changes, the motivation, and any relevant links (issues, docs).

---

### Checklist — required for Merge Queue
- [ ] This change targets `main` (or a release branch managed by the queue)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where applicable
- [ ] CI passes: the `build` job completes successfully on this PR
- [ ] This PR is ready to be enqueued into the Merge Queue — either:
  - I have added a comment `/trunk merge` to this PR OR
  - I will run `trunk merge <PR_NUMBER>` locally.

Notes: If this PR adds new required status checks, update `.github/merge-queue-schema.yaml` and branch protection rules in `main` accordingly before requesting merge.
